name: multi-field-sub-brick-refinement-on
description: Multi-Field scene with sub-brick refinement enabled end-to-end. Toggles render.subBrickRefinement = true (interval trigger, threshold 2.0, maxDepth 1) which schedules a full atlas rebake via _applyDisplayDiff. Captures the post-bake render PLUS the diagnostic state (subBrickPoolNodeCount > 0 confirms refinement actually ran). When refinement is off the render is byte-identical to multi-field-orbit; when on, CSG-edge fidelity should improve in regions where the interval trigger fires.

commands: window.__canarySetDisplayState({ render: { subBrickRefinement: true, subBrickTrigger: 'interval', subBrickThreshold: 2.0, subBrickMaxDepth: 1 } })
